Object.Name: Data Download
Object.Description1: LONA garden map and zone transfer. Valid download request requires all four writable resources to be set within single write.

Item.Name: Slot
Item.Description: File type identifier 258: garden map 260: zone

Item.Name: Checksum
Item.Description: CRC16-XModem checksum over the whole content of the data resource. Same algorithm as Lemonbeat uses so the value can directly be passed on to firmware_init.

Item.Name: Content Tag
Item.Description: The content tag is a 32 bit value with the meaning for the backend of identifying the data content (similar to HTTP-ETag). Semantics of the Content Tag is up to the user.

Item.Name: Status
Item.Description: Current state of data download process: 0: <empty>: not active 1: uploading: transfer to device in progress 2: activating: activating data 3: activated: process completed successfully 4: upload_failed: failure during data upload 5: activation_failed: data not activated
